## Editing.IImportOptions.onCollisionMode property

How to handle existing collection with same ID. - 'replace': Replace existing collection - 'create-new': Create new collection with different ID - 'fail': Fail if collection exists

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly onCollisionMode: 'replace' | 'create-new' | 'fail';
```
